M-INSTALL.NAME: VPS Installer
M-INSTALL.Purpose: Bootstrap a clean Ubuntu VPS into a running KPprotoN deployment through a single `install.sh` entry point.

Scope.Item: Install Docker Engine and Docker Compose plugin if absent
Persist optional REG.RU API credentials from shell env without additional prompts
Choose between issuing a new wildcard certificate and importing an existing certificate pair
Trigger certificate provisioning or certificate import before container startup
Preserve a guided manual wildcard DNS-01 flow when automation credentials are absent
Print operator-facing status and final portal URL

Interfaces.Interface: Interactive installer for first-time deployment and reruns.

Risks.Risk: Operator confusion around wildcard DNS challenge prerequisites
